mapper.select: SELECT c.course_name AS courseName, c.teacher_name AS teacherName, cs.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, cs.start_section AS startSection, cs.end_section AS endSection, cs.start_week AS startWeek, cs.end_week AS endWeek, cs.week_type AS weekType, cs.classroom AS classroom FROM course c LEFT JOIN course_schedule cs ON c.id = cs.course_id WHERE cs.day_of_week = #{dayOfWeek} AND #{week} BETWEEN cs.start_week AND cs.end_week ORDER BY cs.start_section

SELECT c.course_name AS courseName, c.teacher_name AS teacherName, cs.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, cs.start_section AS startSection, cs.end_section AS endSection, cs.start_week AS startWeek, cs.end_week AS endWeek, cs.week_type AS weekType, cs.classroom AS classroom FROM course c LEFT JOIN course_schedule cs ON c.id = cs.course_id WHERE #{week} BETWEEN cs.start_week AND cs.end_week ORDER BY cs.day_of_week, cs.start_section
